SUBELEMENT E1 - COMMISSION'S RULES
E1A01 (A) On which HF bands is a General class license holder granted all amateur frequency
privileges?
A. 160, 75, 40, 20, 15, and 10 meters
B. 160, 30, 17, 12 and 10 meters
C. 80, 40, 20, and 15 meters
D. 60, 30, 17, and 12 meters

E1A02 (C) Which of the following is required before an amateur station may provide information
regarding hazardous road conditions?
A. Nothing special is required
B. Permission from the local police
C. There must be an immediate threat to human life or property
that is not available via normal communication systems
D. Coordination with FEMA

E1E10 (C) [97.509(m)]

E1B01 (D) How many volunteer examiners are required to administer an amateur operator license examination?
A. Two
B. Four
C. Five
D. Three

E1C01 (B) Which of the following has been withdrawn from use in the current question pool?
A. Question bank A
B. Withdrawn
C. Nothing has been withdrawn
D. Supplemental material only
